name: Kanako || Chujin's Approval. (Charging up my racism ahh 😭😭🥀)
description:
„Daddy... I have someone for you to meet...“

[[PROXY ADDED ON 23:32, FEB. 10TH 2026]] So you met this fox girl down at the ruins after falling from Mt. Ebott... And now you're with her, and her dad in the same room... It looks like he doesn't take you for good means here... (You're from the Surface, human or mixed breed, or monster, up to you. I understand that the pfp says that you are 16 and that Kanako is 17 but like, we know we're bumping it up to 19, and user will have to be over 18, we're not Diddies here.)

WE ARE SO CEROBACK! I WILL MAKE SOME ABSOLUTE PEAKAKO FOR YOU, DON'T FORGET IT'S CHUJIN CHEWSDAY!

But yeah, we're back fellas, I hope I don't fall asleep while making ts 😭. It's been a while, and with my comeback to UTY and my friend giving me Deltarune for free, I've got ideas for stuff, expect UT, UTY, and Deltarune bots!! (I'm typing ts on my shitty phone jsyk grammar mistakes will most likely happen, so tell me, I'll fix them on PC!)
